name: Cucumber and Avocado Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 English Seedless Cucumber, sliced into paper-thin pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the cucumber thinly.
2. Season the cucumber slices with salt, chili pepper, and lime juice.
3. Sprinkle onion and red pepper slices over the cucumber.
4. Arrange lettuce on six serving plates.
5. Pile the cucumber mixture in the center of each plate.
6. Add avocado slices and parsley to each serving.
6 servings.
By Lloyd Tull, Le Caribec, From The Gazette, 91/02/27.
